title: Pride and Prejudice
text: Pride and Prejudice is a novel by Jane Austen. It was published in 1813 and follows Elizabeth Bennet and Fitzwilliam Darcy.

title: Natural Questions
text: Natural Questions is a benchmark for open-domain question answering built from real user queries and Wikipedia evidence.

title: The Moon
text: The Moon is Earth's only natural satellite. It orbits Earth about once every 27.3 days.

title: Mount Everest
text: Mount Everest is Earth's highest mountain above sea level. It is located in the Himalayas on the border of Nepal and the Tibet Autonomous Region of China.

title: Python
text: Python is a high-level programming language created by Guido van Rossum and first released in 1991.

title: Hong Kong University of Science and Technology
text: The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology is a public research university in Clear Water Bay, Hong Kong.
